item.title: RTEgaa: RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 9min Dessie Dolan and Brian Fenton give their takes on how they expect the football championship to un
item.description:
RTÉ GAA @RTEgaa · 9min Dessie Dolan and Brian Fenton give their takes on how they expect the football championship to unfold in the weeks and months to come
#RTEGAA Podcast: https:// rte.ie/sport/football /2026/0415/1568366-fenton-in-the-big-chair-as-dubs-enter-the-football-fray/ … 2:11 446

item.title: clubber: Clubber @clubber · 13min We are LIVE from FBD Semple Stadium for Round 3 of the Electric Ireland @MunsterGAA Minor Hur

item.description:
The GAA @officialgaa · 25min Conor Whelan made his senior inter-county debut in 2015 as a teenager, but the @Galway_GAA forward is still thoroughly enjoying sport #GAA
https:// soundcloud.com/officialgaa/ga a-ie-interview-galway-2 … 1 2 1 mil

item.title:
pgal10: paul galvin @pgal10 · 55min THREE UP .
Our three-up tee is here @dunnesstores A shout-out to the FRC.
CAID check s
item.description:
paul galvin @pgal10 · 55min THREE UP .
Our three-up tee is here @dunnesstores A shout-out to the FRC.
CAID check shirt and THREE-UP joggers in too, just in time for Championship .
Good luck to all teams this weekend .
https:// dunnesstores.com/paul-galvin/vi ew-all … 2 1 767
